_comment: Config-driven local pipeline runner. Add/change entries here to control how each activity type is executed locally without modifying runner source code.

Wait.description: Waits for the specified duration (in seconds)

Fail.description: Fails the pipeline with a custom message and error code

SetVariable.description: Sets a pipeline variable to the evaluated value

AppendVariable.description: Appends a value to an array pipeline variable

Filter.description: Evaluates each item in the input array against the condition expression

ForEach.description: Iterates over each item in the evaluated items expression and runs child activities

Until.description: Repeats child activities until the expression evaluates to true, or the timeout is reached

IfCondition.description: Branches to the true or false activity set based on the evaluated boolean expression

Switch.description: Branches to the matching case (or default) based on the evaluated on-expression

ExecutePipeline.description: Resolves and executes another pipeline in this workspace with the given parameters

WebActivity.description: Makes an HTTP call using the developer's local network and identity (no MSI)

SynapseNotebook.description: Submits notebook cells to a Synapse Spark pool via the Livy session API. Requires synapse-local-run.json in the workspace root with synapseEndpoint set.

SparkJob.description: Submits a SparkJobDefinition to a Synapse Spark pool via the Livy batch API. Requires synapse-local-run.json in the workspace root with synapseEndpoint set.

Script.description: Executes SQL scripts against Azure SQL Database using pyodbc + AzureCliCredential via Python subprocess.

SqlServerStoredProcedure.description: Executes a stored procedure against Azure SQL Database using pyodbc + AzureCliCredential via Python subprocess.

Copy.description: Streams file content from source to sink for ADLS Gen2/Blob same-format copies. Cross-format conversion (CSV→Parquet etc.) is not supported. See src/copyActivityConfig.json for the supported source/sink matrix.

Lookup.description: Reads from an ADLS Gen2 / Blob dataset. Returns first row or all rows depending on firstRowOnly. JSON and CSV formats are parsed; other formats returned as raw text.

Delete.description: Deletes the file/path specified by the dataset from ADLS Gen2 / Blob.

GetMetadata.description: Returns the requested metadata fields (itemName, itemType, size, lastModified, childItems, exists, count) from an ADLS Gen2 / Blob dataset.

Validation.description: Polls until the ADLS Gen2 / Blob path specified by the dataset exists (and optionally meets size requirements) or the timeout is reached.

WebHook.description: Posts to the configured webhook URL and waits up to callBackTimeoutInSecs for a successful HTTP response.

synapseWorkspace._comment: Livy API polling settings for SynapseNotebook and SparkJob handlers. The workspace endpoint is read from synapse-local-run.json in your workspace root, not from here.
